reply_preview: Thank you, M. — birthdays are exactly the moments we hope cake "Honey" shows up for, and we're glad it was part of yours. "Leaving as a regular" made our morning. Next fresh honey bake is out Saturday morning — come by and we'll have a slice waiting.
response_preview: Replied to rev_001 (5★, M. R.) — thanked them for making cake "Honey" part of their birthday, acknowledged the "regular" line, and pointed to Saturday's fresh honey bake as the next visit. No follow-up needed; rev_003 (2★ wait-time complaint) is still unanswered and should
